project.description: 无人面馆 CI/CD 流水线

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash # 质检 grep -q "红烧肉面" index.html && grep -q "清炒时蔬" index.html && echo "质检通过" || exit 1
# 安装sshpass which sshpass || apt-get update && apt-get install -y sshpass || true
# 部署 sshpass -p "Xq87WaE9vMfW20l3hQ" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@173.254.206.13 "mkdir -p /var/www/html/digital-noodle-house" sshpass -p "Xq87WaE9vMfW20l3hQ" scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 index.html root@173.254.206.13:/var/www/html/digital-noodle-house/
# 飞书通知 curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"msg_type":"text","content":{"text":"✅ 质检通过，招牌菜品已自动上架正式环境，准备营业！"}}' "https://open.feishu.cn/open-apis/bot/v2/hook/1c2e5968-071c-4a69-b88d-c881b55754cc"
